creator: einar@isnic.is
text:
Regression since ftp/curl updated to 8.11:

gmake[1]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/ftp/R-cran-curl/work/curl/src'
installing to /wrkdirs/usr/ports/ftp/R-cran-curl/work/stage/usr/local/lib/R/library/00LOCK-curl/00new/curl/libs
** R
** inst
** tests
** byte-compile and prepare package for lazy loading
Error in source("tools/option_table.txt", env) : 
  tools/option_table.txt:23:20: unexpected input
22:   CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER = 10000 + 23
23:   CURLOPT_HTTPPOST _
                       ^
Error: unable to load R code in package 'curl'
Execution halted
ERROR: lazy loading failed for package 'curl'
* removing '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/ftp/R-cran-curl/work/stage/usr/local/lib/R/library/curl'
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/ftp/R-cran-curl
